title: Your Solopreneur Strategy: Grow Your Business with Clarity
description:
By the end of this course, you will be able to clearly define your business direction, prioritize what truly matters, and make confident decisions using a simple one-page strategy. You’ll walk away with a practical plan that brings focus to your goals, daily actions, and revenue—without the overwhelm of traditional business planning.

In this course, entrepreneur and strategist Tamara Jensen guides you through a streamlined, step-by-step process to align your mission, audience, goals, activities, marketing, and revenue model on a single page. This course is unique because it cuts through complexity and helps you build a strategy you’ll actually use, one that supports both clarity and momentum.

This course is designed for solopreneurs at any stage, whether you’re just starting out, pivoting, or feeling scattered and ready to refocus. By the end of the course, you will be able to articulate your mission and vision, identify your ideal audience, set SMART goals, map core activities, choose effective marketing channels, and create a sustainable revenue model.

To be successful, no prior business background is required—just an open mind, a willingness to reflect, and a desire to create a clear, actionable roadmap for your business.
